interpretation: Selected-policy regime analysis used order_25_2s_2c_risk_adjusted: 158 signals, 117 fills, 11.7% planned-cost ROI, and 6.5% max drawdown. 8 simple pre-trade filters lifted ROI while keeping enough sample. The top diagnostic filter is signal_depth_gte_1000 with 108 signals, 13.6% ROI, and 8.7% max drawdown. No tested filter both lifted ROI and reduced drawdown; the top ROI filter changes drawdown by 2.2%. This is an in-sample two-forward-day diagnostic, so treat filters as paper-trading candidates only.
